summary: Complete testing of CyberDeck DJ Turntable app. All 18 frontend features and 14 backend API endpoints tested and verified working correctly. UI is compact, fits in 1920x800 viewport without scrolling.

issues: Minor warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility)

passed_tests: App loads without errors on https://turntable-pro-7.preview.emergentagent.com
Header has CYBERDECK logo, REC button, and STATIONS button
Two vinyl turntables with tonearms visible (Deck A and Deck B)
Central spectrum visualizer visible between turntables
Crossfader visible with Master/Booth/CUE knobs
Deck A and Deck B control panels visible with CUE, Play, SYNC buttons
Pioneer-style EQ knobs (HI, MID, LOW) visible on each deck
FX RACK knobs (ECH, VRB, FLT, WET) visible on each deck
VU meters, GAIN knob, and VOL fader visible on each deck
Hot cue pads (1-8) visible on each deck - 16 total
Loop controls visible with LOOP button and 1,2,4,8 buttons
Pitch slider visible on each deck
NO SIGNAL text shown when no music playing (no 0.00 placeholders)
All UI fits on one screen without scrolling (800px height)
STATIONS button opens station browser panel with 30 stations
LOAD A STATION TO BEGIN button visible when no station loaded
Backend /api/health endpoint returns healthy
Backend /api/proxy (stream) endpoint works correctly
Play button correctly disabled when no station loaded
Genre tabs (HIP HOP, R&B, TRAP, SOUL) all present
Waveform displays present on both decks
seed_data_creation: Test favorite stations created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features fully tested. Backend API uses Radio Browser external API for stations. Frontend uses Web Audio API for visualization. No database required for stations (fetched live from Radio Browser API). Favorites are stored in MongoDB.
